ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tours" (
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tour */,
  "tour_name" TEXT /* Name of the tour */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company offering the tour */,
  "transportation" TEXT /* Transportation options for the tour */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the tour */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities provided during the tour */,
  "min_passengers" INTEGER /* Minimum number of passengers required for the tour */,
  "max_passengers" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers allowed for the tour */,
  "tour_type" TEXT /* Type of tour */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tour */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the tour */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered for the tour */,
  "tour_guide" TEXT /* Name of the tour guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tours_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tour being booked */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date of the tour */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Return date of the tour */,
  "num_passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_tour_id FOREIGN KEY ("tour_id") REFERENCES tours ("tour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer support, tour operator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tour_operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tour operator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tour operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tour operator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the tour operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the tour operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tour_operator_tours" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tour operator */,
  "tour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id", "tour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the company offering the tour
Minimum number of passengers required for the tour
Maximum number of passengers allowed for the tour
ID of the tour being booked
ID of the customer making the booking
Number of passengers in the booking
ID of the booking being paid for
Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer)
Payment gateway used for the payment
Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer support, tour operator)
Password of the user (hashed for security)
Unique identifier for each tour operator
Email address of the tour operator
Phone number of the tour operator
